title: All Bleach Swords
description: This Resource Pack adds Bleach swords
body:
# Hello everybody!
## I decided to make a Resource pack that adds Bleach swords 

In order to use this all you have to do is have this Resource pack active and simply rename your diamond or netherite sword to whatever sword you desire. At the moment it only has Kyoka Suigetsu and Zangetsu

- If you want Zangetsu just name your sword "Zangetsu"
- If you want Kyōka Suigetsu just name your sword "Kyoka Suigetsu" or "Kyōka Suigetsu"
